description: 考研/四六级标准例句库 - 用于知识库检索和参考

entries.sentence: Education is not preparation for life; education is life itself.
entries.usage: 议论文引用，强调教育的重要性
entries.notes: 分号连接两个并列句，对比结构

entries.sentence: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
entries.notes: the only way to do... is to... 固定句型

entries.sentence: In the face of adversity, she demonstrated remarkable resilience and determination.
entries.notes: in the face of 面临；resilience 坚韧

entries.sentence: Technology has fundamentally transformed the way we communicate, work, and learn.
entries.notes: fundamentally transformed; 三个并列动词

entries.sentence: It is widely acknowledged that environmental protection requires collective effort.
entries.notes: It is widely acknowledged that... 固定句型

entries.sentence: The rapid development of artificial intelligence has raised both excitement and concern.
entries.notes: both... and... 并列结构；raise concern 引起关注

entries.sentence: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
entries.notes: it is... that... 强调句；final vs fatal 对比

entries.sentence: The government has implemented a series of measures to alleviate poverty.
entries.notes: implement measures 实施措施；alleviate 减轻

entries.sentence: Reading extensively can broaden your horizons and enrich your knowledge.
entries.notes: broaden horizons 开阔视野；enrich knowledge 丰富知识

entries.sentence: Cultural diversity should be celebrated rather than merely tolerated.
entries.notes: rather than 而不是；celebrate vs tolerate 对比
